# JSA Enterprises - Safety Nets & Invisible Grills Chennai

## Business Overview
JSA Enterprises is a premium provider of heavy-duty safety netting, modern invisible steel grills, and space-saving ceiling cloth hangers located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. We specialize in household, commercial, and industrial fall protection solutions.

## Core Contacts
- **Phone**: +91 77026 94269
- **Email**: info.jsaenterprises@gmail.com
- **Locations**: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India (30 neighborhoods covered)
- **Website**: https://www.jsaenterpriseschennai.com

## Main Services
1. **Safety Nets (9 Services)**:
   - Balcony Safety Nets (balcony-safety-nets)
   - Children Safety Nets (children-safety-nets)
   - Pet Safety Nets (pet-safety-nets)
   - Pigeon Safety Nets (pigeon-safety-nets)
   - Sports Nets (sports-nets)
   - Construction Safety Nets (construction-safety-nets)
   - Duct Area Safety Nets (duct-area-safety-nets)
   - Monkey Safety Nets (monkey-safety-nets)
   - Industrial Safety Nets (industrial-safety-nets)
2. **Invisible Grills (3 Services)**:
   - Balcony Invisible Grills (balcony-invisible-grills)
   - Window Invisible Grills (window-invisible-grills)
   - Staircase Invisible Grills (staircase-invisible-grills)
3. **Cloth Hangers (2 Services)**:
   - Ceiling Cloth Hangers (ceiling-cloth-hangers)
   - Balcony Cloth Hangers (balcony-cloth-hangers)

## Areas Served in Chennai (30 Zones)
Adyar, Velachery, OMR, ECR, Anna Nagar, T. Nagar, Tambaram, Porur, Madipakkam, Thiruvanmiyur, Mylapore, Nungambakkam, Sholinganallur, Medavakkam, Chromepet, Perungudi, Pallikaranai, Guindy, Alandur, Pallavaram, Chromepet, Thoraipakkam, Siruseri, Navalur, Karapakkam, Injambakkam, Besant Nagar, Vadapalani, Ambattur, Avadi, Kolathur, Mogappair.

## Technical Quality Specs
- **Nets**: HDPE Copolymer nylon, UV-treated, weather-resistant.
- **Grills**: SS316 marine-grade steel cables wrapped in clear nylon protective casing. Spacings: 2 to 4 inches.
- **Hangers**: Rust-free stainless steel rods with pulley-cord lifting systems.
